name: codex-avatar
description: Create a Q-style animated avatar pack for Codex workspace replies.

interface.shortDescription: Turn one person photo into Codex state GIFs
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through creating a Q-style animated avatar pack from one single-person photo, then installs workspace rules so Codex can use local state GIFs in replies.
defaultPrompt: Create my Codex avatar from this photo
Install Codex Avatar in this workspace
Remove Codex Avatar from this workspace
